goal: Gravity-dispenser bulk-part singulation feed: create_gravity_dispenser drops parts one at a time onto a vibratory conveyor; a proximity sensor at the singulation point detects each part-present event and gates a Franka arm to pick and transfer the part to an output bin. Exercises create_gravity_dispenser (first use in library), add_proximity_sensor as part-present detector, belt-gated setup_pick_place_controller (sensor_gated mode), and the pick_place pattern where workpieces arrive asynchronously rather than from a fixed source path.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-gravity-dispenser-feeder:

1) Dispenser geometry: create_gravity_dispenser at path /World/Dispenser, target_xy=[0.0, 0.0] (drop zone on belt), drop_height=1.20m above belt surface (belt surface z=0.78; dispenser mouth at z=0.78+1.20=1.98). n_items=10 parts (0.06m cubes). Parts pre-spawned stacked vertically inside the dispenser tube; released one by one via physics gate. item_size=0.06m chosen so parts land on belt without bouncing far off.

2) Infeed conveyor: 1.5m long, oriented in +Y. Position [0.0, 0.0, 0.78], size [0.35, 1.5, 0.05]. surface_velocity=[0, 0.15, 0] carries each dropped part toward the singulation sensor at y=0.65.

3) Singulation sensor: add_proximity_sensor at /World/SingulationSensor, position [0.0, 0.65, 0.845], size [0.38, 0.08, 0.10]. Watches /World path pattern. When part enters this volume the sensor triggers; setup_pick_place_controller (sensor_gated mode) pauses belt, picks part, drops in bin, resumes belt.

4) Franka arm: mounted on table at [0.55, 0.40, 0.75]. Pick station: singulation sensor centroid projected onto belt surface z=0.805 → pick_target=[0.0, 0.65, 0.845]. Bin at [0.55, 0.40, 0.78] (beside robot). drop_target=[0.55, 0.40, 0.90] (above bin). home_target=[0.55, 0.20, 1.05] (clear of belt).

5) Physics: CPU MBP dynamics to stabilise dispenser drops. sleepThreshold default (parts should remain active while on belt). Belt speed low (0.15 m/s) to prevent parts overshooting sensor before pickup.

6) Output bin: create_bin at /World/OutputBin, position=[0.40, 0.40, 0.78], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.18]. Bin on separate table at robot right side.

7) Controller mode: sensor_gated + coord-IK (pick_target / drop_target / home_target). belt_path=/World/InfeedBelt so belt pauses during pick. grip_style=fixed_joint for stability.

8) Success criterion: 8 of 10 parts arrive in bin (verified via overlap_sphere on bin volume or list_contacts). Sensor gates prevent double-picks.
code:
# ── Lighting and ground ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU MBP for stable gravity-dispenser drop ───────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Infeed conveyor (carries dropped parts to singulation sensor) ─────────────
# Belt surface z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805. Parts settle at ~z=0.835 (half size 0.03).
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.78],
    size=[0.35, 1.5, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0, 0.15, 0],
)

# ── Gravity dispenser: 10 parts, 0.06m cubes, dropped onto belt ───────────────
# drop_height is height of dispenser mouth above belt surface.
create_gravity_dispenser(
    dispenser_path="/World/Dispenser",
    target_xy=[0.0, -0.55],
    drop_height=1.20,
    n_items=10,
    item_size=0.06,
)

# ── Singulation sensor at belt far end ────────────────────────────────────────
# Triggers when a part enters the pickup zone at y=0.65.
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/SingulationSensor",
    position=[0.0, 0.65, 0.845],
    size=[0.38, 0.08, 0.10],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Dispenser",
)

# ── Robot work table and Franka arm ──────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.55, 0.40, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0.55, 0.40, 0.75],
)

# ── Output bin (beside robot) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/OutputBin",
    position=[0.40, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.18],
)

# ── Sensor-gated pick-place controller ───────────────────────────────────────
# Waits for SingulationSensor trigger, pauses belt, picks part at sensor position,
# places in OutputBin, resumes belt. Cycles until dispenser empties.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SingulationSensor",
    belt_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    pick_target=[0.0, 0.65, 0.845],
    drop_target=[0.40, 0.40, 0.97],
    home_target=[0.55, 0.20, 1.05],
    grip_style="fixed_joint",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/RobotTable", "/World/InfeedBelt", "/World/OutputBin"],
)
failure_modes: Part bounce on drop: dispenser drop_height=1.20m may cause 0.06m cubes to bounce off belt and miss the singulation sensor. Mitigation: lower drop_height to 0.60m, or add physics_material rubber to dispenser items to dampen bounce.
Belt overshoots sensor: part slides past SingulationSensor at y=0.65 before robot can pick. Mitigation: reduce surface_velocity to 0.08 m/s, or widen sensor volume in Y to 0.15m.

Double-dispense: if dispenser releases two parts in rapid succession, second part enters sensor before robot completes first pick cycle, triggering double-pick attempt. Mitigation: belt_path pause prevents second part advancing; verify dispenser release interval is >= pick cycle time.

cuRobo reach from robot_base=[0.55, 0.40, 0.75] to pick_target=[0.0, 0.65, 0.845]: lateral distance ~0.63m, delta-Z ~0.095m — within Franka 0.85m reach. Confirm IK succeeds; if not, shift robot_base to [0.45, 0.50, 0.75].
OutputBin at [0.40, 0.40, 0.78] drop_target z=0.97 — bin floor at 0.78+0.01=0.79, walls at 0.78+0.18=0.96. drop_target z=0.97 is 0.01m above bin rim; adjust to 0.95 if parts miss bin interior.

dispenser_path watched_path_pattern mismatch: items emitted by create_gravity_dispenser may appear under a path other than /World/Dispenser. Probe with list_all_prims(filter='/World/Dispenser*') and update watched_path_pattern accordingly.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}},
    position={{infeed_conveyor.position}},
    size={{infeed_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{infeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_gravity_dispenser(
    dispenser_path={{dispenser.path}},
    target_xy={{dispenser.target_xy}},
    drop_height={{dispenser.drop_height}},
    n_items={{dispenser.n_items}},
    item_size={{dispenser.item_size}},
)

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{singulation_sensor.path}},
    position={{singulation_sensor.position}},
    size={{singulation_sensor.size}},
    watched_path_pattern={{dispenser.path}},
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.55, 0.40, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/RobotTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
)

create_bin(
    prim_path={{output_bin.path}},
    position={{output_bin.position}},
    size={{output_bin.size}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{singulation_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}},
    pick_target=[0.0, 0.65, 0.845],
    drop_target=[0.40, 0.40, 0.97],
    home_target=[0.55, 0.20, 1.05],
    grip_style="fixed_joint",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/RobotTable", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{output_bin.path}}],
)
